description: A styled h1 heading element used as the primary page or article headline.

props.text: Showcasing White Rose University Press: Quality and Innovation in Open Access Publishing

stories.name: LongTitle
stories.description: A headline with a longer title spanning multiple words

notes: Both h1.headline and .headline refer to the same element — always an h1 tag with the headline class. Text always varies across pages, making it a required string prop.
